commit.message:
fix: stage files before diff so new/untracked files are visible to evaluator

git diff only sees tracked file modifications. When the implementor
creates new files, they're untracked and invisible to the evaluator.

Fix: git add -A → git diff --staged → git reset HEAD (unstage).
This captures all changes including new files, then unstages so the
evaluator's approve/reject flow controls the final commit.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
sec: Add provider_no validation to fix 31 tainted-session alerts in DxresearchReport2Action (#1491)

* sec: Add provider_no validation to fix tainted-session alerts in DxresearchReport2Action

- Add getValidatedProviderNoList() and getValidatedProviderNo() helper methods
  with regex validation (alphanumeric 1-6 chars, _grp_ prefix with 1-20 chars)
- Update 5 patient methods to use helper, returning ERROR for invalid input
- Add provider_no validation to patientExcelReport()
- Add code format validation (CODE_PATTERN) to addSearchCode()
- Add nosemgrep suppression to editDesc() (already encoded with Encode.forHtml)
- Add nosemgrep suppressions to all session.setAttribute calls with justifications
- Fix editCodeDesc.jsp: quote all HTML attribute values to prevent XSS
- Add unit tests for provider_no validation across all methods

Fixes carlos-emr/carlos#1441

- Fix editDesc() double-quoting: remove String.format wrapping quotes,
  store raw value; encoding moved to JSP render time
- Fix editCodeDesc.jsp: use Encode.forHtmlAttribute() for value attrs,
  Encode.forHtml() for body text, handle null safely
- Extract GROUP_PREFIX constant to replace magic number 5
- Allow * (All Providers) sentinel in PROVIDER_NO_PATTERN
- Remove redundant MockitoAnnotations.openMocks() (base class handles it)
- Add valid-input SUCCESS tests for patientExcelReport,
  patientRegistedDistincted, patientRegistedDeleted, patientRegistedResolve
- Add test for * sentinel value

fix: use --no-condition instead of --condition=None for gcloud compat

portable flag.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: derive API base from page path for ProxyPassReverse compatibility

Previously const API='' was hardcoded, meaning API calls always went to
the root path. When served behind a reverse proxy sub-path such as
  http://host:port/cpp_cli_srv/
fetch() requests went to /post/run instead of /cpp_cli_srv/post/run.

Fix: compute API prefix from window.location.pathname at runtime:
  /cpp_cli_srv/   → API = '/cpp_cli_srv'
  /               → API = ''  (unchanged for direct access)

Also include API in the curl display baseUrl so the copied command
matches the actual sub-path (e.g. baseUrl/cpp_cli_srv/post/run).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: clear stuck spinner and reset conversation on cancel

Two bugs triggered by pressing X during generation:

1. Spinner stuck forever — onError(CancellationException) called close() on
   the callbackFlow without emitting Complete, so the catch block in
   sendMessage() never ran and isStreaming stayed true on the message bubble.

2. Next message dumped raw system prompt — LiteRT conversation object left in
   a partial/corrupted state after cancelProcess(), causing the following
   message to receive raw context instead of a normal response.

Fix: cancelGeneration() in ChatViewModel now:
- Clears isStreaming on any stuck message immediately
- Calls resetConversation() to give LiteRT a clean slate for the next turn
  (conversation history is preserved in Room/UI; only LiteRT's internal
  context window is reset)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

EXP-1531–1538: Physics-model fidelity as primary therapy assessment

Replace ADA consensus-based grading (A/B/C/D) with physics-model
fidelity metrics that measure how well therapy settings match glucose
dynamics science, rather than judging patient outcomes against
population targets. Outcomes are a patient's choice; we measure
therapy calibration fidelity.

Key findings across 11 patients:
- RMSE (5.0–16.0 mg/dL) and correction energy are the actionable
  fidelity signals; R² is universally negative (expected with 76.5%
  unannounced meals)
- Correction energy correlates r=0.94 with RMSE but only r=-0.59
  with TIR — fidelity measures something different from outcomes
- 3/11 patients are discordant: ADA grades higher than calibration
  quality warrants (AID loop compensates for poor settings)
- Postprandial R² worse than fasting for all patients — carb ratio
  is the dominant error source
- ADA retained as safety floor only (TBR alerts)

Fidelity grade thresholds calibrated from empirical distribution:
Excellent (RMSE≤6, CE≤600), Good (≤9, ≤1000), Acceptable (≤11,
≤1600), Poor (>11, >1600).

Includes 4 visualization figures and detailed report.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

  matching backend semantics

commit.message:
fix: normalize SVG flags with viewBox for proper scaling

- Add normalizeSvg() to inject viewBox from width/height attributes
- Strip fixed width/height from SVG tags so they scale to container
- Regenerate all 252 flag SVGs with viewBox, no fixed dimensions
- Add preserveAspectRatio support to FlagAtom via resizeMode prop
- Add overflow:hidden to FlagAtom container to prevent bleed
- Remove deprecated useNativeImage prop from map markers

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Generate Unicode category/script tables at runtime; update case fold to Unicode 17.0 (#126)

Replace ~2,000 lines of static Unicode category and script arrays with
runtime generation from JDK's Character.getType() and
Character.UnicodeScript.of(). This ensures categories and scripts always
match the running JDK's Unicode version.

Case folding (CASE_FOLD, TO_LOWER) remains static but is updated to
Unicode 17.0 (CaseFolding.txt), adding entries for Garay, Beria Erfe,
Cyrillic TJE, and several Latin pairs. Static fold tables can safely be
ahead of the JDK — entries for unrecognized code points are harmless
dead code, and Unicode's stability policy prevents reassignment.

Also fixes unicodeSpace() which incorrectly included U+001C-001F (file/
group/record/unit separators) — these are not in Unicode's White_Space
property. Filed as #125.

Adds UnicodeJdkConsistencyTest with canary tests that will fail when a
new JDK ships with a newer Unicode version that adds case pairs or
whitespace characters, signaling that the static tables need updating.

Fixes #107
Refs #125

Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Address PR review comments

  switch to double-quoted outer string with escaped inner double quotes)

  (comment said 'Fix file ownership' but block adds the alias)

- main.go: fix containerName/CONTAINER_ID mismatch in NI lock-win path
  (when adaptRunArgsForNonInteractive renames the container to niName,
  update containerName and the -e CONTAINER_ID= arg in runArgs to match)

- main.go: release NI lock on docker run failure
  (declare niLockFile before the NI block, set it when we win the lock,
  and call releaseNILock before os.Exit/log.Fatalf on docker run error
  so the lock is not left stranded when the container fails to start)

- README.md: clarify -N flag runs claude specifically (not arbitrary command)

- README.md: document fixed-name coordination container (agentjail-ni.<prefix>)
  in the VS Code integration how-it-works section

- noninteractive_test.go: add tests for tryNILock/releaseNILock covering
  successful acquisition, contention, and stale lock cleanup

fix: prevent crash when package-name option is missing in http-client-csharp (#10315)

## Problem

When running the C# emitter with no options (specifically no
`package-name`), the C# generator crashes with an
`InvalidOperationException` instead of reporting a diagnostic or using a
default.

## Changes

### C# Generator
- **`Configuration.cs`**: Made `package-name` optional with a
`DefaultPackageName` fallback (`"GeneratedClient"`). Removed
`ReadRequiredStringOption` since no options are required anymore.
- **`CodeModelGenerator.cs`**: In `Configure()`, resolves the default
from `PrimaryNamespace` (code model namespace) and emits an info message
— per [Josh's
suggestion](https://github.com/microsoft/typespec/issues/9554#issuecomment-3844175280).

### TypeScript Emitter
- **`emitter.ts`**: Generator failures now report diagnostics via
`sdkContext.logger.error()` instead of throwing unhandled exceptions.

### Tests
- Updated `ConfigurationTests.cs`: verify default package name behavior
and PrimaryNamespace resolution.
- Added emitter test: verify generator failure reports diagnostic
without crashing.

Fixes #9554

---
:robot: Created with JonathanCrd copilot

---------

fix: correct 8 accuracy issues in hypoglycemia report and figures

Report text fixes:
- Prevalence range: 2.5-10.7% → 0.8-10.7% (Level 1), 0.2-4.1% → 0.0-4.1% (Level 2) per EXP-1493/1491
- Error multiplier: 2.54× → 1.9× (39.8/21.5 from table in context)
- Nadir correlation: mislabeled as IOB-nadir, corrected to recovery-nadir (EXP-1498 field: recovery_vs_nadir_correlation)
- EXP-1281 citation: removed incorrect 33-96% suspension claim (EXP-1281 is basal adequacy, not suspension rates)
- Moderate tier TBR: 0.8-1.0% → 0.75-1.04% (patient d = 0.75%)

Visualization fixes:
- Fig 3 Panel B: carb_treated array corrected for 5/11 patients (c,d,g,h,k were scrambled)
- Fig 1 Panel B: Below 70 R² corrected from 0.153 to 0.149
- Fig 5: hypo_density normalized to sum to 1.0

commit.message:
perf: switch devcontainer from universal (~10GB) to base:ubuntu (~200MB)

The universal:2 image is ~10GB and includes Java, .NET, Go, Ruby, PHP,
etc — none of which this workshop uses. Then we were re-installing
Python, Node, PowerShell, and Azure CLI as features on top of what
universal already shipped.

Switch to base:ubuntu-22.04 (~200MB) and install only the 4 features
we actually need. Also:
- Combine pip install into single call with --quiet flag
- Remove redundant remoteUser (base image uses vscode by default)
- Remove pwsh as default terminal (not all participants prefer it)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
